# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

apiVersion: 2021-04-01
resources:
- type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myFunctionApp
  location: [location]
  kind: functionapp
  properties:
    serverFarmId: [appServicePlanId]
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
        value: "~3"
      - name: WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE
        value: "[packageUrl]"
  identity:
    type: SystemAssigned

- type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
  apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'storageRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference('myFunctionApp', '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Storage Account Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"

- type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
  apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'keyVaultRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference('myFunctionApp', '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Key Vault Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"

- type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
  apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'sqlRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference('myFunctionApp', '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'SQL DB Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"

- type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
  apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'cosmosDbRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference('myFunctionApp', '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Cosmos DB Account Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"
